title: From Designer to DevOps: A Career Transition Guide
description: A comprehensive 6-12 month roadmap for graphic designers transitioning into DevOps and SysOps in the Montreal market.

schemas.headline: From Designer to DevOps: A Career Transition Guide
schemas.description: A comprehensive 6-12 month roadmap for graphic designers transitioning into DevOps and SysOps in the Montreal market. Includes salary data, learning paths, top employers, and certifications.
